ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "contact_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the patient's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the patient's location */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the patient's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the patient's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the patient's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the patient's address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient's address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the facility's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the facility's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the facility's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the facility's address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the facility's address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the facility's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the facility's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_facility_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-facility mapping */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the healthcare facility */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the patient's association with the facility */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the patient's association with the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the healthcare facility */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the appointment */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the healthcare facility */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "prescription" TEXT /* Prescription details */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
